title: Unbound Combat
description:
This Mod Provides With Very Little Extra Content (Kinda)
This Being A New Weapon,The Ancient Dagger!
body:
**New Weapon!**

Found In Nether Fortresses, Are Ancient Daggers!

These Little Doohickeys Are Simple, It's A Dagger, That Let's You Parry An Oncoming Attack, Storing Some Of It's Damage.

Do Note, That Whenever You Hit Something, It'll Use Up All Your Stored Damage To Boost It, So Be Careful!



Faithful Maces and Backported Spears Are Optional For Some Content
